title: A New Experience at the City Language Club
article_text: I am a member of a city language club. Our club has a new member this term, and she is a nice person. She is quite sure about her ability to learn English, although she is at a beginner level. Her experience with English is bad, but she is able to learn with our support. We meet at night once a week, and we sit in a line. The teacher is present at every meeting to help us. We learn new words from a list, and we understand them with examples. I lead the group for a short time, and I buy some books for the class. It is important for us to learn whether a word is on the left side or the right side. There are enough books for every person, and we thank the teacher for her help.

sentences.en: I am a member of a city language club.
sentences.zh: 我是一个城市语言俱乐部的成员。

words.eng_def: a person who is part of a group

sentences.en: Our club has a new member this term, and she is a nice person.
sentences.zh: 我们俱乐部这学期有一位新成员，她是一个好人。

words.eng_def: a period of time for school or work

sentences.en: She is quite sure about her ability to learn English, although she is at a beginner level.
sentences.zh: 她对自己的英语学习能力很有信心，尽管她处于初级水平。

words.eng_def: having the power to do something
to get new knowledge or skill
in spite of the fact that
a position on a scale of amount or quality

sentences.en: Her experience with English is bad, but she is able to learn with our support.
sentences.zh: 她的英语经历不好，但她能够通过我们的支持来学习。

words.eng_def: the process of doing and seeing things
not good or of low quality

sentences.en: We meet at night once a week, and we sit in a line.
sentences.zh: 我们每周晚上见一次，我们坐成一排。

words.eng_def: the time when it is dark
a straight mark or a row of things

sentences.en: The teacher is present at every meeting to help us.
sentences.zh: 老师每次会议都在场帮助我们。

sentences.en: We learn new words from a list, and we understand them with examples.
sentences.zh: 我们从列表中学习新单词，并通过例子理解它们。

words.eng_def: to know the meaning of something

sentences.en: I lead the group for a short time, and I buy some books for the class.
sentences.zh: 我带领小组一小段时间，我给班级买了一些书。

words.eng_def: to show the way or be in charge
to get something by paying money

sentences.en: It is important for us to learn whether a word is on the left side or the right side.
sentences.zh: 对我们来说，学习一个词是在左边还是右边很重要。

words.eng_def: used to show a choice between two things
a position to the left or right

sentences.en: There are enough books for every person, and we thank the teacher for her help.
sentences.zh: 有足够的书给每个人，我们感谢老师的帮助。

vocabulary.eng_def: the time when it is dark
having the power to do something

vocabulary.eng_def: help or approval
used to show a choice between two things

vocabulary.eng_def: a straight mark or a row of things

vocabulary.example: The book is on the left side.

vocabulary.eng_def: to a fairly large degree
in spite of the fact that

quiz.question_cn: 下列哪个词的意思是“成员”？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'a person who is part of a group'?
Which English word means 'in spite of the fact that'?
Which English word means 'as much as is needed'?
Which English word means 'the process of doing and seeing things'?
Which English word means 'used to show a choice between two things'?

image_prompts: A person standing outside a city building with a sign that says 'Language Club'.
A group of people sitting in a circle, one new person smiling, with a calendar showing 'New Term'.
A woman with a confident face holding a book, with a small 'Beginner' label on the book.
A person looking sad at a test paper with a low score, and friends around offering help.
A clock showing night time, a group of people sitting in a straight row of chairs.
A teacher standing in front of a classroom, with a 'Present' checklist on the wall.
A list of words on a board, with a student pointing at one word and a sample sentence below.
A person leading a small group, holding a book, with a shopping bag of books nearby.
A word on a blackboard with arrows pointing left and right, and a question mark above.
A table with a stack of books, and people saying 'Thank you' to a smiling teacher.
